title: Wounded Wolf
description: A wounded wolf lies beside the forest path. An arrow protrudes from its shoulder, yet it growls weakly as you approach. It could become a loyal companion... or an easy target.

options.title: Help the Wolf
options.description: Remove the arrow, bandage its wounds, and nurse it back to health.

options.title: Leave It Alone
options.description: Nature will decide its fate. You continue on your journey.

options.title: Kill the Wolf
options.description: A wounded predator is still a predator. You end its suffering and take its valuable pelt.
